commit_scope: Repair the Hostinger deploy race exposed by the kernel-router canary rollout: do not use the static-only fast path when API health is unknown, and start the canary service without rebuilding API dependencies.

local_validation.summary: The deploy fast path now disables static-only sync when the running API SHA cannot be read, forcing the rebuild path that restores API health before static syncs. The kernel-router canary bring-up now uses docker compose up --no-deps for kernel-router, so it does not recreate the already-running API service while adding the header-gated canary.

known_limitations.observed: This hotfix is not deployed until its PR merges and Hostinger Auto Deploy reruns.

deploy_validation.notes: Current public API recovered after the superseded deploy race. The fixed script still needs a fresh deploy run.

phase_gate.reason: The script-level race fix is local until PR merge, CI, and a fresh deploy run prove it.
